data.html:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

model Program {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  name      String
  host      String?
  description String?
  dayOfWeek Int      // 0=Dom, 1=Lun, ..., 6=Sab
  startTime String   // "06:00"
  endTime   String   // "08:00"
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  imageUrl  String?
  genre     String?
  sortOrder Int      @default(0)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Message {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  content   String
  type      String   @default("info") // info, alert, promotion
  imageUrl  String?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  priority  Int      @default(0)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Settings {
  id    String @id @default(cuid())
  key   String @unique
  value String
}

model AdminLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  action    String
  detail    String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

model Video {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  title     String
  youtubeUrl String   // full YouTube URL or video ID
  description String?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  sortOrder Int      @default(0)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model SongRequest {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  listenerName String?
  message   String
  type      String   @default("request") // request, greeting, message
  isRead    Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}
